plugins.name: data
plugins.description: Write SQL, explore datasets, and generate insights faster. Build visualizations and dashboards, and turn raw data into clear stories for stakeholders.

plugins.name: cre8
plugins.description: Design system intelligence for the Cre8 / Innovexa component library. Provides MCP tools for component lookup, code generation, and an mcp-ui bridge for serving cre8-wc UIs through Python MCP servers.
